summary: The capsule correctly surfaces the upstream-timeout precursors and the Connection-refused / no-live-upstreams failure, but omits the [crit]-level escalation (lines 107-110) and the worker-restart recovery at 14:10:35 that would confirm service restoration.
improvements: Include at least one [crit] evidence line to convey severity escalation beyond [error]
Add the worker-restart notice (line 118-121) as a recovery-context entry so the engineer knows when service came back
